01 / OVERVIEW

Vertical Overview

Our Manpower Sourcing and Staffing division connects global EPC contractors and industrial operators with skilled engineers, construction leads, startup specialists, and safety auditors. We maintain a database of verified professionals, performing technical credentials audits, safety reviews, and background checks. Whether you need a short-term engineering team or long-term operations staff, we manage the complete staffing loop, including recruitment, payroll, and mobilizations.

Business Value Delivery

We shorten recruitment lead times by 40% through our active, pre-vetted database of EPC specialists. Our compliant payroll and mobilization management reduce administrative overhead, allowing clients to focus on project delivery.

Key Differentiators

  • EPC-specific recruitment database covering process, piping, E&I, and commissioning.
  • Strict credentials verification process confirming education and certificates.
  • Compliant global mobilization support including visas, tax, and logistics.
02 / CAPABILITIES

Specialized Workflows

Technical Recruitment & Sourcing

We source mechanical designers, commissioning engineers, site supervisors, and cost managers, matching candidates to technical requirements.

Credentials Verification & Audits

We verify candidate qualifications, past project records, safety logs, and references to ensure candidate reliability.

Contract Staffing & Payroll Management

We manage contractor payroll, tax compliance, insurance, visa clearances, and logistics, keeping mobilizations compliant.

03 / SECTORS SERVED

Industries Supported

EPC Contractors
Asset Operator Teams
Fabrication Yards
Commissioning Teams
Renewables Projects
04 / EXECUTION TIMELINE

Project Delivery Stages

Interactive tracking of progress gates from bid to delivery handovers.

Stage 01 / Talent Requisition Review

We review candidate requirements, including technical skills, certificates, and salary.

Stage 02 / Candidate Screening & Auditing

Sourcing candidates, verifying qualifications, and checking references.

Stage 03 / Technical Interviews & Shortlists

Our engineers interview candidates, compiling technical shortlists.

Stage 04 / Handovers & Site Mobilization

Contract signed, payroll setup, and candidate mobilized to site.

06 / CASE STUDY

Execution in Practice

Refinery Commissioning Staffing Program

The Challenge

A refinery project needed 24 instrument loop checkers and 8 commissioning supervisors in 4 weeks, but the local market lacked talent.

Our Approach

We tapped our pre-vetted database, sourcing candidates from our networks in other regions. We checked loop test credentials and references.

The Result

All 32 specialists were recruited, verified, and mobilized to the refinery site in 3 weeks, ensuring the pre-commissioning phase started on schedule.

07 / EXECUTED PROJECTS

Related Experience

Piping Designers Staffing Program

Chennai, India

Recruitment and deployment of 15 Aveva PDMS/E3D piping designers for a brownfield modification project.

12,800 Hours Completed

Substation HSE Engineers Sourcing

Bangalore, India

Staffing of 6 safety managers and site inspectors for a multi-utility electrical grid construction program.

8,400 Hours Completed

LNG Terminal Commissioning Recruitment

Kochi, India

Sourcing and contract staffing of 10 process startup operators and loop test supervisors.

7,200 Hours Completed
08 / QUESTIONS & ANSWERS

Frequently Asked Questions

What engineering disciplines do you staff?

We source process, piping, civil/structural, mechanical, electrical, instrumentation, controls, HSE, and project management personnel.

How do you verify candidate credentials?

We verify candidate degrees, certifications, references, and safety records directly with past employers and boards.

Do you support short-term contracts?

Yes, we support contract staffing ranging from 3 months to multi-year contracts, as well as direct hires.

How are mobilizations and travel managed?

We manage travel logistics, including visas, flights, tax compliance, and local accommodation if required.
